description: Server-side JavaScript code for a database visualization web application using Express.js, supporting multiple database types (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB). It handles environment variable loading, database connection testing, and provides API endpoints for retrieving database tables and data.

classes.name: DatabaseAdapter
classes.description: Abstract base class for database adapters, defining interface methods for testing connection, retrieving tables, and fetching data.

classes.name: SQLAdapter
classes.description: Base class for SQL database adapters, providing common methods for executing queries and retrieving table info.

classes.name: PostgresAdapter
classes.description: Adapter for PostgreSQL databases, implementing query execution and schema retrieval.

classes.name: MySQLAdapter
classes.description: Adapter for MySQL databases, implementing query execution and schema retrieval.

classes.name: SQLiteAdapter
classes.description: Adapter for SQLite databases, implementing query execution and schema retrieval.

classes.name: MongoDBAdapter
classes.description: Adapter for MongoDB, implementing connection, collection listing, and data retrieval.

methods.name: loadEnvFiles
methods.description: Loads environment variables from specific .env files for different databases.

methods.name: testConnections
methods.description: Tests connections to configured databases and returns list of successful ones.

methods.name: handleApiRequest
methods.description: Generic handler for API requests, executing database operations and returning JSON responses.
